# Multi Resolution Graph Based Clustering

**Summary**: A machine learning algorithm used to group data based on multiple features simultaneously.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-al-amri|Al-Amri, 2015]] applied MRGC to predict permeability by clustering lithofacies and log data.

## Key Results and Findings

- The MRGC approach solved dimensionality problems when log data was constrained with few clusters. ([[2015-al-amri|Al-Amri, 2015, p. 36]])
